    multimedia/vlc: Remove SCHROEDINGER option

    Details:
    - libschroedinger has been removed from the ports tree due to lack of
      upstream support.
    - This change removes the vlc port support for libschroedinger.

    PR:             264995
    Reported by:    bsd@philippost.de
    MFH:            2022Q3
